channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: US stock markets close on high after Iran war drove oil prices above $100 a barrel.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Apple smart home display rumors now point to a fall launch with iOS 27.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts and rumors.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Scientists create slippery nanopores that supercharge blue energy.
